Tokyo Rose
Charlottesville, VA
Seating Capacity: 0
Venue Type : Bar/Club

Total Gigs: 41
  Blue Indigo  (41)

 Description
Tokyo Rose was a Japanese restaurant with a club and stage in the basement.
